title: Errors — investigate the top error
prompt: Take our top ERROR-severity log pattern and run a full investigate on it. Tell me whether it's an acute spike, gradual drift, or stable. Quote actual rates and time windows from the tool output.
persona: Oncall SRE doing root-cause work after a quiet alert.

expected_answer.summary: Investigation of the top ERROR pattern should produce a coherent report (acute-spike or stable). Expected to use log10x_investigate with the resolved pattern name.
